features.name: wide wire assignment from shift with large parameter
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with bit width exceeding 32 bits assigned from a right shift operation where the shift amount is a parameter

features.name: wide reg assignment from shift in always block
features.description: Code should include a reg declaration with bit width exceeding 32 bits assigned from a right shift operation inside an always block, where the shift amount is a parameter

features.name: function return type with shift operation on parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with a return type wider than 32 bits that performs a right shift operation on a parameter inside the function body

features.name: localparam shift assignment as control reference
features.description: Code should include a localparam with a wide bit width assigned from a right shift operation to serve as a control reference for the same pattern that fails in wire/reg contexts
